tasks.subject: Task 1: Add regression test asserting 3-way path alignment
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land a failing test that captures the alignment invariant so the next two tasks have a green-bar target.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_config_paths.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] New test file exists with three test functions.
- [ ] Running the suite shows all three failing with current code.
- [ ] Each test has a docstring explaining the failure mode it catches.

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_config_paths.py -v` -> 3 FAIL.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_config_paths.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_config_paths.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["test file exists with 3 test functions", "3 FAIL on current code", "each test has docstring"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Restore Python container path defaults
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Green the first two assertions by restoring the 1bb288a7 defaults in pydantic_settings.BaseSettings.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/config.py` (lines 33-35)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] settings.DOWNLOAD_REQUESTS_PATH == '/app/download_requests'.
- [ ] settings.DOWNLOAD_RESULTS_PATH == '/app/download_results'.
- [ ] Inline comment documents the contract with docker-compose.yml.
- [ ] First two regression tests pass; daemon test still red.

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_config_paths.py -v` -> 2 PASS, 1 FAIL.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/config.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_config_paths.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DOWNLOAD_REQUESTS_PATH == /app/download_requests", "DOWNLOAD_RESULTS_PATH == /app/download_results", "inline comment present", "2 PASS 1 FAIL"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Rename daemon env var to canonical names
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Green the third assertion by renaming the daemon env var read from *_DIR to *_PATH, unifying with the Python side.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/download_daemon.sh` (lines 17-21)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Daemon reads DOWNLOAD_REQUESTS_PATH instead of DOWNLOAD_REQUESTS_DIR.
- [ ] Daemon reads DOWNLOAD_RESULTS_PATH instead of DOWNLOAD_RESULTS_DIR.
- [ ] Default host paths unchanged.
- [ ] All three regression tests pass.
- [ ] git grep finds no remaining legacy references in code.

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_config_paths.py -v` -> 3 PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/download_daemon.sh"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_config_paths.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["daemon reads _PATH names", "no _DIR references in code", "3 PASS"]}
```
